verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I came to worship You I came just to sing Your praise I came to love You, Lord. Your Holy name to raise. Hallelujah, hallelujah Oh, how I worship You, You are my Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We came to worship You We came just to sing Your praise We came to love You Lord Your Holy name to raise Hallelujah, hallelujah Oh how we worship You You are our Lord Oh how I worship You Oh how I worship You Oh how I (We) worship You You are my Lord
